nodes.name: Neutral posture
nodes.description: STUB placeholder for neutral standing posture (feet hip-width, weight centered, spine stacked).
nodes.measurable_success_criterion: STUB - shoulder-hip-knee vertical alignment within 0.04m on each side; head landmark within 0.05m of vertical through hip midpoint
nodes.drill_description: STUB drill - hold neutral stance for 30 seconds while breathing.

nodes.name: Weight shift
nodes.description: STUB placeholder for transferring weight side-to-side on a steady pulse.
nodes.measurable_success_criterion: STUB - hip midpoint lateral displacement >0.05m per beat, alternating direction
nodes.drill_description: STUB drill - shift weight L/R on the beat for 60 seconds.
common_mistakes: STUB - leaning torso instead of shifting hips

nodes.name: Shoulder isolation
nodes.description: STUB placeholder for isolated shoulder roll/lift without engaging the rest of the torso.
nodes.measurable_success_criterion: STUB - shoulder landmark vertical displacement >0.04m while hip midpoint moves <0.01m
nodes.drill_description: STUB drill - alternate shoulder lifts on the beat.

nodes.name: Hip isolation
nodes.description: STUB placeholder for isolated hip movement without torso engagement.
nodes.measurable_success_criterion: STUB - hip midpoint lateral displacement >0.04m while shoulder midpoint stays within 0.02m baseline
nodes.drill_description: STUB drill - side hip pops on the beat.

nodes.name: Two-step
nodes.description: STUB placeholder for a basic two-step travel pattern (step-touch L, step-touch R).
nodes.measurable_success_criterion: STUB - ankle lateral travel >0.10m per step, alternating L/R on the beat
nodes.drill_description: STUB drill - two-step in place for 60 seconds.

nodes.name: Body roll
nodes.description: STUB placeholder for a vertical body roll combining chest and hip isolations.
nodes.measurable_success_criterion: STUB - chest forward displacement >0.06m precedes hip forward displacement >0.04m within 250ms
nodes.drill_description: STUB drill - slow body rolls top-to-bottom.
common_mistakes: STUB - rolling whole torso at once

nodes.name: Arm wave
nodes.description: STUB placeholder for the classic arm wave vocabulary move.
nodes.measurable_success_criterion: STUB - sequential elevation: wrist rises before elbow before shoulder, each by >0.04m within 400ms window
nodes.drill_description: STUB drill - slow arm waves L then R.

nodes.name: Apt. challenge routine
nodes.description: STUB placeholder routine node for the Apt. challenge — links the dance fixture to its required skills with weights.
nodes.measurable_success_criterion: STUB - overall DTW similarity >0.7 over full reference duration
nodes.drill_description: STUB drill - run the routine end-to-end at half speed.
